channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: APSRTC bus collision with stationary lorry in Gajuwaka leaves three dead and seven injured
item.description: A tragic road accident occurred in the early hours of Sunday at Sri Nagar Junction under Gajuwaka police station limits in Visakhapatnam, where an APSRTC super luxury bus collided with a stationary co...

item.title: Ramachandra Guha on how Congress leadership issues have strengthened Narendra Modi’s political dominance
item.description: In this opinion article, historian Ramachandra Guha critically examines the role of the Gandhi family in the declining fortunes of the Congress party and argues that their leadership style has indirec...

item.title: Alyssa Solomon pulls out from PVL Rookie Draft
item.description: Alyssa Solomon has officially withdrawn from the PVL Rookie Draft, as reported by ABS-CBN News. The development comes ahead of one of the most anticipated entry processes in Philippine volleyball, whe...

item.title: Mass Arrests in Paris Following Celebrations of PSG Champions League Victory
item.description: On Saturday night, Paris saw violent scenes as thousands of PSG fans celebrated their Champions League final win. Police detained over 280 people in Paris alone, while nationwide the number reached 41...

item.title: Rita Ogbebor raises alarm over rising ethnic tension and electoral boundary dispute in Delta State
item.description: Prominent Itsekiri leader, Rita Ogbebor, don call on the Federal Government to urgently step into the growing tension for Warri area of Delta State, as dispute over ward delineation dey increase fear ...

item.title: IPL 2026 final: RCB face Gujarat Titans in Ahmedabad on May 31, 2026
item.description: The Hindu reports that the IPL 2026 final will be contested between two defending champions, Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) and Gujarat Titans (GT), at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad on May...

item.title: Peter Obi becomes NDC presidential candidate, vows major power sector reform
item.description: Peter Obi don officially become the presidential candidate for Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC) during their convention wey hold for Abuja on Saturday. As him dey accept di flag bearer position, he t...

item.title: Thai actors Pond and Phuwin set to return to the Philippines for an upcoming fan concert
item.description: Thai actors Pond Naravit and Phuwin Tangsakyuen are set to return to the Philippines for a fan concert, according to a report published by ABS-CBN News on May 31, 2026. The announcement highlights the...

item.title: First group of Hajj pilgrims returns to Islamabad after completing pilgrimage
item.description: Pakistan’s Hajj return operations have officially started as the first group of pilgrims arrived in Islamabad after completing Hajj in Saudi Arabia. According to officials, the first return flight car...

item.title: Corporate Travel Management negotiates with lenders over UK operations after financial irregularities
item.description: Corporate Travel Management (CTM), the ASX-listed travel agency, has been in a prolonged state of financial uncertainty following the discovery of misconduct in its UK operations. Nine years after VGI...

item.title: Nigerian Catholic priest convicted in US for sexually assaulting women seeking spiritual guidance
item.description: A Nigerian Catholic priest, Anthony Odiong wey dey serve for Diocese of Uyo, Akwa Ibom State, don get serious wahala for United States. E don been convicted by Texas jury for sexual assault after e ab...

item.title: Poll shows Becerra leading California governor primary, with Steyer and Hilton close behind
item.description: A new Emerson College poll released just days before California’s gubernatorial primary shows former state Attorney General Xavier Becerra strengthening his lead in a competitive race. Becerra, a Demo...

item.title: Catholic exorcist Carlos Martins describes alleged demonic experiences during his early ministry
item.description: Father Carlos Martins, a Canadian Catholic priest known for his work as an exorcist and host of The Exorcist Files podcast, has spoken about his personal experiences which he believes point to the exi...

item.title: Oyo APC governorship candidate and party leaders meet Tinubu over 2027 election plans
item.description: The governorship candidate of the All Progressives Congress (APC) in Oyo State, Sharafadeen Alli, alongside senatorial candidates and party leaders, visited President Bola Tinubu at his Lagos residenc...

item.title: Daniel Atkinson scores solo try for the Dragons against the Broncos
item.description: Dragons playmaker Daniel Atkinson produced a standout individual moment in an NRL clash against the Brisbane Broncos, scoring a brilliant solo try that highlighted his awareness and skill under pressu...

item.title: China’s manufacturing growth stalls amid weak domestic demand and global uncertainty
item.description: China’s manufacturing sector showed signs of stagnation in May, according to official data, raising fresh concerns about the resilience of the country’s economic recovery. The purchasing managers’ ind...

item.title: DHS reviews sale of former secretary Kristi Noem’s luxury Boeing 737 acquired with public funds
item.description: According to reporting cited by NBC News and summarized by Raw Story, the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) is evaluating the potential sale of a Boeing 737 Max 8 that was acquired during the...

item.title: University student steps in to replace ill musician during Justin Hurwitz’s La La Land in Concert performance in Sydney
item.description: A remarkable moment unfolded during the opening night of Justin Hurwitz’s La La Land in Concert in Sydney when a 21-year-old audience member unexpectedly became part of the performance. During the int...

item.title: Referee Decision Explained After Arsenal Penalty Appeal Rejected in Champions League Final
item.description: Arsenal were left frustrated after a key penalty appeal was turned down during their UEFA Champions League final clash against Paris Saint-Germain (PSG). The incident happened in extra time, specifica...

item.title: JAAC Maintains June 9 Strike Call After Extended Talks Fail to Resolve Refugee Seats Dispute
item.description: A lengthy round of negotiations between a federal ministerial delegation and the Jammu Kashmir Joint Awami Action Committee (JAAC) concluded in Muzaffarabad without reaching a final agreement, leading...
